title: gaultheria × fagifolia
intro: Gaultheria × fagifolia, also known as Gaultheria x fagifolia, is a hybrid plant species that results from the cross between Gaultheria shallon and Gaultheria procumbens. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds like salicin, which has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gaultheria × fagifolia include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Gaultheria × fagifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to create salves and ointments for topical application.
